attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SPTH.THINV	AS	BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_NUM
,SPTH.THIDTE	AS	BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_DT
,SPTH.THNPAS	AS	BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_PSNGR_NUM_INT
,SPTH.THACBR	AS	BK_AMX_TRVL_INV_ACTG_BRNCH_NUM
,SPTH.THMCID	AS	BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_MACHINE_ID
,SPTH.THSEQN	AS	BK_AMEX_TRVL_HOTEL_SEQ_NUM_INT
,COALESCE( NHCR.BK_HOTEL_COMPLIANCE_CD , EPTH.HOTEL_COMPLIANCE,'UNKNOWN' ) as BK_HOTEL_COMPLIANCE_CD /* Referencing in R10 */
		/* New columns in R10  */
,COALESCE( SPTH.THBTYP,'=')  as HOTEL_BOOKING_TYPE_CD
,SPTH.THPHNE as HOTEL_PHONE_NUM
,SPTH.THNAME as HOTEL_NAME
,SPTH.THADDR as HOTEL_STREET_ADDR
,SPTH.THCITY as HOTEL_CITY_NAME
,COALESCE(SPTH.THSTAT,'=')  as HOTEL_STATE_OR_PROVINCE_CD
,COALESCE( SPTH.THADTE,cast('1900-01-01' as date) ) as HOTEL_ARRIVAL_DT
,SPTH.THDDTE as HOTEL_DEPARTURE_DT
,SPTH.THZIP as HOTEL_POSTAL_CD
,COALESCE ( NICT.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE , SPTH.dv_THHCTY  ,'UNK' )  as HOTEL_ISO_COUNTRY_CD
,SPTH.THCCDE as HOTEL_CITY_CD
,SPTH.THCFRM as HOTEL_BOOKING_CONFIRMATION_NUM
,COALESCE (SPTH.THEXRT,0)  as RPTD_HOTEL_CURRENCY_EXCHNG_RT
,COALESCE (SPTH.THHCDE,'=')  as HOTEL_CHAIN_CD
,COALESCE (SPTH.THHCDI,'=')  as HOTEL_DOMESTIC_INTL_CD
,COALESCE (SPTH.THHCOM,0)  as AGENCY_COMMISSION_AMT
,SPTH.THNIRM as NO_OF_GUESTS_IN_ROOM_NUM_CNT
,SPTH.THNITE as RESERVED_NIGHTS_CNT
,SPTH.THMPAS as MAXIMUM_PASSENGER_INT_NUM
,COALESCE (SPTH.THOAMT,0) as HOTEL_BILLING_LOCAL_AMT
,COALESCE( NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK')  as   LOCAL_ISO_CURRENCY_CD
,SPTH.THPNR as AMEX_PNR_LOCATOR_ID
,COALESCE(SPTH.THRATE,0) as DAILY_ROOM_REPORTING_RT_AMT
,SPTH.THROOM as HOTEL_ROOMS_RESERVED_CNT
,COALESCE( SPTH.THRTYP ,'=') as HOTEL_ROOM_TYPE_CD
,COALESCE( SPTH.THREAS,'=')  as HOTEL_REASON_CD
,SPTH.THAMAD as AMADEUS_HOTEL_PROPERTY_NUM
,SPTH.THGALI as GALILEO_HOTEL_PROPERTY_NUM
,SPTH.THAPOL as APOLLO_HOTEL_PROPERTY_NUM
,SPTH.THSABR as SABRE_HOTEL_PROPERTY_NUM
/* */  
 , 'I' AS ACTION_CODE
 ,  'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM
(
SELECT
THINV,THIDTE,THNPAS,THACBR,THMCID,THSEQN
,THBTYP
,THPHNE
,THNAME
,THADDR
,THCITY
,THSTAT
,THADTE
,THDDTE
,THZIP
,CASE WHEN THHCTY ='***' THEN NULL ELSE THHCTY END AS dv_THHCTY
,THCCDE
,THCFRM
,THEXRT
,THHCDE
,THHCDI
,THHCOM
,THNIRM
,THNITE
,THMPAS
,THOAMT
,THPNR
,THRATE
,THROOM
,THRTYP
,THREAS
,THAMAD
,THGALI
,THAPOL
,THSABR
,THOCUR
FROM $$STGDB.ST_POST_TRAVEL_HOTEL
UNION ALL
SELECT THINV,THIDTE,THNPAS,THACBR,THMCID,THSEQN 
,THBTYP
,THPHNE
,THNAME
,THADDR
,THCITY
,THSTAT
,THADTE
,THDDTE
,THZIP
,CASE WHEN THHCTY ='***' THEN NULL ELSE THHCTY END AS dv_THHCTY
,THCCDE
,THCFRM
,THEXRT
,THHCDE
,THHCDI
,THHCOM
,THNIRM
,THNITE
,THMPAS
,THOAMT
,THPNR
,THRATE
,THROOM
,THRTYP
,THREAS
,THAMAD
,THGALI
,THAPOL
,THSABR
,THOCUR
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_POST_TRAVEL_HOTEL
		)
 SPTH 
Inner Join $$ETLVWDB.EL_POST_TRAVEL_HOTEL EPTH
    ON (	SPTH.THINV  = EPTH.THINV 
		and SPTH.THIDTE = EPTH.THIDTE
		and SPTH.THNPAS = EPTH.THNPAS
		and SPTH.THACBR = EPTH.THACBR
		and SPTH.THMCID = EPTH.THMCID
		AND SPTH.THSEQN = EPTH.THSEQN
		)  
Inner Join  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE NATI 
	ON (	NATI.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_NUM    =  SPTH.THINV 
		and NATI.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_DT      = SPTH.THIDTE
		and NATI.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_PSNGR_NUM_INT = SPTH.THNPAS
		and NATI.BK_AMX_TRVL_INV_ACTG_BRNCH_NUM = SPTH.THACBR
		and NATI.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_MACHINE_ID    = SPTH.THMCID
		)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TRAVEL_AMEX_ISO_COUNTRY    ETCISOC
	ON  SPTH.dv_THHCTY = ETCISOC. AMEX_COUNTRY_CODE     
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NICT
	on ETCISOC.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE  =   NICT.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NIC
	ON ( SPTH.THOCUR =  NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE  
	      and NIC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01') 
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HOTEL_COMPLIANCE_REASON NHCR
	ON (NHCR.BK_HOTEL_COMPLIANCE_CD = EPTH.HOTEL_COMPLIANCE)

SELECT 
BATCH_ID             ,           
THIDTE               ,         
THMCID               ,         
THACBR               ,         
THINV                ,         
THNPAS               ,         
THSEQN               ,         
THBTYP               ,         
THADTE               ,         
THROOM               ,         
THNITE               ,         
THNIRM               ,         
THRTYP               ,         
THRATE               ,         
THHCDE               ,         
THNAME               ,         
THADDR               ,         
THCITY               ,         
THSTAT               ,         
THZIP                ,         
THPHNE               ,         
THCCDE               ,         
THREAS               ,         
THCCUR               ,         
THOAMT               ,         
THCFRM               ,         
THOCUR               ,         
THCRTE               ,         
THHCOM               ,         
THCANC               ,         
THRTEM               ,         
THPNR                ,         
THDDTE               ,         
THHCTY               ,         
THTRNR               ,         
THMPAS               ,         
THHCDI               ,         
THEXRT               ,         
THSABR               ,         
THAPOL               ,         
THAMAD               ,         
THGALI               ,         
THFIL1               ,         
THFIL2               ,         
FK_TRAVEL1           ,         
XPK_ROW1             ,         
CREATE_DATETIME      ,         
ACTION_CODE          ,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE 
    FROM $$STGDB.ST_POST_TRAVEL_HOTEL SPTH 
    WHERE NOT EXISTS 
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE NATI 
                               WHERE NATI.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_NUM    =  SPTH.THINV 
		and NATI.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_DT      = SPTH.THIDTE
		and NATI.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_PSNGR_NUM_INT = SPTH.THNPAS
		and NATI.BK_AMX_TRVL_INV_ACTG_BRNCH_NUM = SPTH.THACBR
		and NATI.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_MACHINE_ID    = SPTH.THMCID
		)
